_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description:
You can:
- maintain a clear understanding of the cyber and information security risks across the whole organisation
- develop and implement risk assessment processes
- oversee the assessment of the organisation's partners and supply chain for potential threats or vulnerabilities
Examples of leadership using this skill:
- building a culture where teams have awareness of, and take responsibility for, risks and mitigating them
- advising programme owners and people running IT services about risks in a way that enables them to act on that advice
- communicating with senior leaders in a way that enables them to make decisions about accepting or mitigating risk
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing and maintaining a model risk governance framework, including policy development, role and responsibility definition, escalation protocols, exception management, and board-level model risk reporting.
comments: DDaT skill superset of WIDAI RM domain. RM-S-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-S-003 (SP, cosine: 0.549), RM-K-012 (RM, cosine: 0.537).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.6/10 (raw 0.560). Shared vocabulary: [responsibility, risk, skill]. DDaT-only terms [accepting, across, act, advice, advising, assessment] vs WIDAI-only terms [board, definition, designing, development, escalation, exception] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.842 (P=0.820, R=0.865). R exceeds P by 0.045 — the WIDAI KSA's 26 words are well-captured by the DDaT element's 105 words, but the DDaT element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance:
NLI: neutral-dominant (93.9%). "You can:
- maintain a clear understanding of the cyber and information security" and "Skill in designing and maintaining a model risk governance framework, including" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.558 ≈ STS 0.560 (gap 0.002). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [responsibility, risk, skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.0%. Shared tokens: [responsibility, risk, skill]. DDaT-only: [accepting, across, act, advice, advising, assessment]. WIDAI-only: [board, definition, designing, development, escalation, exception].
